zh.Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Cala: 法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯貝圖內
zh.Mortagne-du-Nord, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Cala: 法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德莫塔尼-度-諾爾德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Everard III Ralph de Mortagne於1129年出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德莫塔尼-度-諾爾德時，他的父親Evrard II Radulf van Peteghem chatelain de Tournai19歲，母親Richilde de Hainaut21歲。他和Gertrude de Lorraine de flandres至少有1個兒子。他去世於1190年3月7日在比利時海瑙特圖爾奈享年61歲。

zh-hans.Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Cala: 法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯貝圖內
zh-hans.Mortagne-du-Nord, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Cala: 法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德莫塔尼-度-諾爾德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Everard III Ralph de Mortagne于1129年出生在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德莫塔尼-度-諾爾德时，他的父亲Evrard II Radulf van Peteghem chatelain de Tournai19岁，母亲Richilde de Hainaut21岁。他和Gertrude de Lorraine de flandres至少有1个儿子。他去世于1190年3月7日在比利时海瑙特圖爾奈享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mortagne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Francoise, Herve, Marcel, Philippe, Pierre.

French: topographic name for someone who lived on or near a hill, from Old French montaine ‘hill, (small) mountain’; or a habitational name from any of several places called (La) Montagne, named with the same word.

variants.name: Mountain
meanings: English (Yorkshire; of Norman origin): topographic name from Middle English mountaine ‘mountain’ (Old French montagne). See Montagne .
Irish: either of Norman origin, as 1 above, or a variant of   Manton  .

English: variant of Monkton a habitational name from Monkton (Kent, Somerset), Moor Monkton and Nun Monkton (Yorkshire), Bishop Monkton (Yorkshire), or any of numerous other places called Monkton, named with Old English munuc ‘monk’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Lamontagne
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Lucien, Marcel, Emile, Pierre, Aime, Andre, Fernand, Normand, Gaston, Ovide, Achille.
habitational name for someone from any of several places called La Montagne, or a variant of the topographic name Montagne 1, with fused feminine definite article la.

nameMeanings.name: Everard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from eofor ‘boar’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’. This was reinforced at the time of the Norman Conquest by a Continental Germanic form introduced to Britain by the Normans. The modern given name may be a transferred use of the surname, but it was in regular use in the Digby family of Rutland from the 15th to the 17th centuries, probably as a survival of the Norman name. It alternated in this family with Kenelm .

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Everard III Ralph de Mortagne was born in 1129, in Mortagne-du-Nord, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, his father, Evrard II Radulf van Peteghem chatelain de Tournai, was 19 and his mother, Richilde de Hainaut, was 21. He had at least 1 son with Gertrude de Lorraine de flandres. He died on 7 March 1190, in Tournai, Hainaut, Belgium, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Everard III Ralph de Mortagne est né en 1129, à Mortagne-du-Nord, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Evrard II Radulf van Peteghem chatelain de Tournai, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Richilde de Hainaut, avait 21 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Gertrude de Lorraine de flandres. Il est décédé le 7 mars 1190, à Tournai, Hainaut, Belgique, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Everard III Ralph de Mortagne 1129 in Mortagne-du-Nord, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Evrard II Radulf van Peteghem chatelain de Tournai 19 und seine Mutter Richilde de Hainaut 21. Er hatte mit Gertrude de Lorraine de flandres mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 7. März 1190 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Tournai, Hennegau, Belgien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Everard III Ralph de Mortagne è nato il nel 1129 nel Mortagne-du-Nord, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, il suo padre, Evrard II Radulf van Peteghem chatelain de Tournai, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Richilde de Hainaut, aveva 21 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Gertrude de Lorraine de flandres. Morì il 7 marzo 1190, nel Tournai, Hainaut, Belgio, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Everard III Ralph de Mortagneが1129年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスノードモータグネ-ドウ-ノードで生まれた時，父Evrard II Radulf van Peteghem chatelain de Tournaiは19歳，母Richilde de Hainautは21歳であった。彼はGertrude de Lorraine de flandresとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1190年3月7日にベルギーヘイナトトウルナイで61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Everard III Ralph de Mortagne(이)가 1129년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 노르드 모르타그니-드-노르드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Evrard II Radulf van Peteghem chatelain de Tournai(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Richilde de Hainaut(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Gertrude de Lorraine de flandres(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1190년 3월 7일 벨기에 하인오트 토우른아이에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Everard III Ralph de Mortagne nasceu em 1129, em Mortagne-du-Nord, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Evrard II Radulf van Peteghem chatelain de Tournai, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Richilde de Hainaut, tinha 21 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Gertrude de Lorraine de flandres. Ele faleceu em 7 de março de 1190, em Tournai, Hainaut, Bélgica, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Everard III Ralph de Mortagne родился в 1129 г. в местности мортагне-ду-норд, норд, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция, его отцу по имени Evrard II Radulf van Peteghem chatelain de Tournai было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Richilde de Hainaut, 21. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Gertrude de Lorraine de flandres. Он умер 7 марта 1190 г. в местности тоурнеи, ханаут, Бельгия в возрасте 61 год.

sm.from 1188 to 1197: mai le 1188 e o'o I le 1197

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Everard III Ralph de Mortagne nació en 1129, en Mortagne-du-Nord, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, su papá, Evrard II Radulf van Peteghem chatelain de Tournai, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Richilde de Hainaut, tenía 21 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Gertrude de Lorraine de flandres. Murió el 7 de marzo de 1190, en Tournai, Hainaut, Bélgica, a la edad de 61 años.
